title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.440 - Payment to grantees, procedure
text:
630.440.  Payment to grantees, procedure. — The department shall pay the grantees in periodic interim payments rather than lump sum payments and shall require that the grantees, before receiving any subsequent payments after their initial payments, submit invoices describing their expenses, progress reports on establishing the residential facilities, day programs or specialized services and written reports of the services they have provided with the funds they have received.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
